name: processguard-andon
description: ProcessGuard Andon - modern internal manufacturing command and live alert system.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,WEB -c blue,green "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/web && npm run build -w apps/api
scripts.setup:dev: npm run db:generate && npm run db:push && npm run db:seed
scripts.build:sqlite: npm run db:generate:sqlite && npm run build
scripts.db:push:sqlite: node scripts/run-sqlite.mjs prisma db push --schema prisma/sqlite/schema.prisma
scripts.setup:sqlite: npm run db:generate:sqlite && npm run db:push:sqlite && npm run db:seed:sqlite
scripts.check: npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/web
